text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The training track is quiet at night, perfect for
rumination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sit in the stands, thinking over the training
routine for tomorrow, when...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Good evening. Are you... thinking about work...
at this hour?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Being a trainer... must be tough.
choice_data_list: What I'm doing now is no big—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the middle of my reply, I notice the sound of
someone running. When I turn to look...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's... her.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I think you're amazing the way you train diligently
all by yourself!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Her running...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
C'mon... Run faster! I can't stop here... not until I
catch up to her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a fire in her eyes, she runs as if in pursuit of
someone invisible. It's almost like...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Like... me?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean... she's also... chasing after
someone?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But... there's no one... in front of her...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Okay, one more time! C'mon! I got this!
I'm not finished yet.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh? C-Cafe?

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Good evening! Um, do you want to run together
aga—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Who...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Who exactly... are you chasing?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
We can't see... who you're chasing. Do you also...
have a Friend... only you can see?

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: W-well, rather than a "Friend," it's... uh...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I imagine that you're there!

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Because I look up to you a lot!

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
How should I describe this? I feel incredibly
inspired just from seeing you run.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I felt jealous of your Friend, so I thought... I'd
chase after you... who's always chasing after them.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: After... me...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Mark my words! I won't give up... not until I
catch up to you as you continue challenging
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined... anyone would.... chase after
me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I only ever looked ahead... I only ever looked at
my Friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: This feels strange... To her, I'm...
choice_data_list: Her very own Friend, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm. I don't know... about that... But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The me who's chasing... after someone... as well as
the me... who someone wishes... to chase...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I should be capable... of running in a way that's...
fitting.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Also...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I want to visit... the hospital tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Since she's chasing me... I'll run with her... in the
flesh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a small bow of courtesy, Manhattan Cafe
heads back to the track, which has now become
eerily empty.
